        20-50-80mV:


0000: c0 01 3a 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 43 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 48 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 41 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4e 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4e 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 45 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4c 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 31 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 3a 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 52 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 41 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4e 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 47 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 45 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 3a 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 35 00 00 00 00 00 0000: c0 01 32 00 00 00 00 00 ///BULDUM!!!! küsürat
0000: c0 01 30 00 00 00 00 00 / tam kısım
0000: c0 01 2e 00 00 00 00 00 / 0-80mV 10mV adım kademe
0000: c0 01 30 00 00 00 00 00
0000: c0 01 6d 00 00 00 00 00
0000: c0 01 56 00 00 00 00 00
0000: c0 01 0d 00 00 00 00 00


1V:

0000: c0 01 3a 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 43 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 48 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 41 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4e 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4e 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 45 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4c 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 31 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 3a 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 52 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 41 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 4e 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 47 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 45 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 3a 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 35 00 00 00 00 00 0000: c0 01 31 00 00 00 00 00 değer seçici
0000: c0 01 30 00 00 00 00 00 / c001003100000000 100mV
0000: c0 01 2e 00 00 00 00 00 0000: c0 01 30 00 00 00 00 00 100mV 1V adım
0000: c0 01 30 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 6d 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 56 00 00 00 00 00 /
0000: c0 01 0d 00 00 00 00 00 /
